headline: We can't promise returns. Here's what we can show you.
subhead: FarmThru is opening to investors on Birchal. We believe in full disclosure, not hype.
hero_copy:
Most investment pages lead with the upside. We're going to lead with honesty.

FarmThru is an early-stage business. Investing in early-stage businesses carries real risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. We won't dress that up.

sections.heading: What we can show you
sections.body:
We can show you 50+ regenerative farms across NSW that partner with us. We can show you 2,000+ families who already order through FarmThru. We can show you a hub-and-collect model that cuts out unnecessary middlemen and gets food from paddock to pick-up in 2-3 days.

We can show you a $130B Australian grocery market where farm-direct food is growing at 24% year-on-year. And we can show you every number, every farm, and every dollar in our disclosure document on Birchal.

sections.heading: What we won't do
sections.body:
We won't promise returns. We won't minimise the risks. We won't use words like "guaranteed" or "safe" because early-stage investing is neither.

What we will do is give you every piece of information you need to make your own decision. The disclosure document on Birchal covers our financials, our risks, our team, and our plan. Read it. Consider seeking independent financial advice. Then decide.

sections.heading: The terms
sections.body:
FarmThru's equity crowdfunding campaign launches on Birchal in July 2026.

Minimum investment: $50. Maximum cap: $10,000 per investor. VIP deposit: $5 (fully refundable) for first access, priority updates, and exclusive Q&A with the founders.

Join the waitlist now. When the campaign opens, you'll have the full picture before anyone else.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Clean, understated design. No hype. Hero: simple typography on white with a single farm landscape image. Below-fold: traction metrics displayed clearly, team photos, Birchal badge. Tone is calm confidence. Trust-building through restraint, not persuasion.
